title: Jungle Lodges Karnataka is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Jungle Lodges Karnataka is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Jungle Lodges Karnataka are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka!
